profile.name: Mathan Kumar P
profile.title: Assistant Professor of Physics
profile.bio: Passionate about research on thin film fabrication and nanomaterial synthesis for electrochemical applications

experience.title: Assistant  Professor
experience.organization: PSG Institute of Technology and Applied Research
experience.description: Delivering Engineering Physics to 1st year UG students across CSE, ECE, EEE, MECH branches  Focus on concept-based teaching aligned with Anna University syllabus, GATE, and industry applications  Specialization in Semiconductor Physics, Electromagnetism, Quantum Mechanics, and Optics  Use problem-solving, real-world examples, and demos to bridge theory and engineering practice  Mentoring students for academic excellence, project work, and competitive exams

experience.title: Postdoctoral Researcher
experience.organization: SRM institute of Science and Technology
experience.description:
• Preparation of 2D MoS2 via MOCVD (newbie)
• Gas Phase Sulfurization of Metal oxides
• Exploration of layer grown 2D materials for Electrochemical Applications

experience.title: MHRD RUSA Research Fellow
experience.description:
Sulfurization of metal of Metal Oxides using Hydrothermal method\n 
Preparation of Counter electrodes\n 
Fabrication of lab Scale Dye Sensitized Solar Cell device\n 
Achieved a higher photovoltaic performance with 7.09 % efficiency"

academic.description:
Thesis : "Investigation on the Structural, Morphological, Surface, and 
Electrochemical Properties of Hydrothermally Sulfurized Metal Oxides 
for it’s Application in Dye Sensitized Solar Cells"
